title: The Grand Staff & Middle C
description: See how the Treble and Bass clefs connect to form the Grand Staff, bridged by Middle C.

lessons.title: The Middle C Bridge
lessons.description: Understand how Middle C connects the two clefs.
lessons.prompt: Explain the Grand Staff. Show how Middle C sits exactly between the Treble and Bass clefs. Create exercises that alternate playing Middle C in the Treble clef and the Bass clef to solidify this connection visually.

lessons.title: Two Hands Playing
lessons.description: Read simple melodies that cross between clefs.
lessons.prompt: Create simple two-handed exercises on the Grand Staff. Keep it to alternating hands (not playing simultaneously yet). For example, a measure in the bass clef followed by a measure in the treble clef, moving smoothly through Middle C.
